case_title: CHRISTIAN MICHAEL DIPPON VS. ANAHIT HAKOBYAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ENTRY & REJECTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIPPON, CHRISTIAN MICHAEL
